item.title: Sophos Firewall and Synchronized Security
item.description: Synchronized Security is a unique capability you won’t get anywhere else.

item.title: GitHub internal repositories breached.
item.description: A malicious VS Code extension led to cloned private repositories, reportedly offered for sale on a criminal forum

item.title: Sophos named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection for the 17th consecutive report
item.description: Strong endpoint protection remains critical. But in today’s AI-driven threat environment, it's most powerful when it's part of a broader, coordinated defense.

item.title: Canvas attack aftermath: What risks come next?
item.description: The compromise of student data turned a cyber mom into a cyber mama bear

item.title: Encore Performance: Sophos ranked #1 Overall in Endpoint, EDR, XDR, MDR, and Firewall for the 2nd consecutive time in the G2 Summer 2026 Reports
Pointing a Cursor at evading detection
item.description: AI accelerated tool development and testing, but humans drove the workflow

item.title: You do surprise me.exe: An unexpected executable in Hola Browser
item.description: Following a certification test, Sophos X-Ops found an unexpected guest had hitched a ride

item.title: Sophos Workspace Protection update
item.description: Learn more and share your feedback with the team on the Sophos Workspace Protection Community.

item.title: Bug bounties in the Mythos era
item.description: How AI is rewriting vulnerability research, and how our program has adapted
